title: Higher Contrast
description: Expands the concept of the built-in High Contrast pack!
body:
WHAT IS HIGHER CONTRAST?

Higher Contrast is a pack that expands the concept of the recent built-in resource pack added in Minecraft: Trails & Tails. The built-in pack only affected the main menu. However, this pack brings it to the next level, adding it all over the GUI, so you can fully experience high contrast.
